ref: Jesus used stories when he spoke to the people. In fact, he did not tell them anything without using stories.

translated: Yes, when you go to the market, you will find the market full, but when you go to the farm, you will find the farm empty. The people are in the market, the market is full (Luke)

ref: Everything they do is just to show off in front of others. They even make a big show of wearing Scripture verses on their foreheads and arms, and they wear big tassels for everyone to see.

translated: Ziro went to where the people were gathered and spoke to them, but they did not listen, so Wosoci's children taught them to learn and take it upon themselves, yet they still did not understand, so he helped them year after year until they finally left.

ref: So they went. At noon and again about three in the afternoon he returned to the market. And each time he made the same agreement with others who were loafing around with nothing to do.
